arts.ttl: Inter Miami team news: is Lionel Messi playing against New York City FC?
arts.sum: Speaking to the media before facing New York City FC, Inter Miami assistant coach Javier Morales explained: “First, the other day, Leo played for 30 minutes. New York City FC host Inter Miami at Yankee Stadium on Saturday (September 21), a game in which Lionel Messi and Co can take another step towards winning the Supporters’ Shield and breaking the MLS points record .
